HEALTH_STATUS.notes: ERR_001 root cause identified and fixed: PERFORMAOCE_SNAPSHOT typo in Step 8 corrected to PERFORMANCE_SNAPSHOT. Commit 5e98a50.

ERR_001.fix_description: Root cause: Step 8 wrote to key PERFORMAOCE_SNAPSHOT (typo: O not N) so PERFORMANCE_SNAPSHOT was never persisted. Step 9 fallback also used wrong key PEIPFOPMANCE_SNAPSHOT. Both fixed to PERFORMANCE_SNAPSHOT. Also fixed ttimestamp typo (Steps 4+6) and leading space (Step 5). All 4 bugs patched in single commit.

bugs_fixed.description: Step 9 fallback key typo PEIPFOPMANCE_SNAPSHOT -> PERFORMANCE_SNAPSHOT
Double-t ttimestamp typo in Steps 4 and 6
Leading space before manage_memories in Step 5
